title: 1 step DFU - Content of the Software Update tab when there is update available only for Charge Case
scenario: Verify that when a firmware update is available only for the Charge Case, the Software Update tab correctly displays earbuds as up to date, charge case version info, release notes, and an Update button.
steps: 1. Ensure a firmware update is available only for the Charge Case (CC).
2. Navigate to the Software Update tab.
3. Observe the displayed information for Earbuds.
4. Observe the displayed information for the Charge Case.
5. Check for the presence of release notes.
6. Check for the presence of an Update button.
expected: The Software Update tab should show: Earbuds marked as up to date, Charge Case current/available version, release notes, and an Update button.
